parameters.jsCode:
return items.map((item, idx) => {
  const j = item.json || {};
  const original = $items('Read Binary File1')[idx]?.json || {};
  const pdf = j.manufacturer_pdf_base64 || j.file_content_base64 || original.file_content_base64 || '';
  if (!pdf) {
    throw new Error('Missing manufacturer pdf');
  }

  const prompt = `You are a strict classifier for MTR manufacturer names.
Return ONLY valid JSON with the key "manufacturer".
Choose the closest match from this list, or return "" if not present.
Do not add extra keys.

List:
- JANCO_STEEL
- CHAPEL_STEEL
- Nucor steel-berkeley
- Cleveland-cliffs plate llc
- North America stainless Canada inc
- nucor steel Norfolk
- Nelson steel company
- wuyang iron and steel co. ltd
- Kocaer Celik san ve tic as
- Novasco
- Demir cel ik
- gautier steel
- ALGOMA
- ILSENBURGER
- INDUSTEEL
- ATLANTIC TUBE
- LEECOL
- CLEVELAND CLIFF
- NOVA TUBE
- STEEL DYNAMICS
- CHINA STEEL
- NIAGARA LASALLE
- NUCOR STEEL
- SWVA KENTUCKY
- THE STEEL SUPPLY
- TUBE INVESTMENTS
- ZHEJIANG MINGHE
- AM/NS CALVERT
- GERDAU
- AECELORMITTAL
- SWVA, INC
- SSAB
- GAUTIER STEEL
- WELDED TUBE
- STEEL WAREHOUSE
- ALLIANCE TUBULAR
- AMERICAN HEAVY
- MARUCHI LEAVITT
- JADE STERLING
- B&T STEEL
- EVRAZ
- ATLAS TUBE
- ACIER FATI
- ALTON STEEL
- NLMK
- BULL MOOSE
- VOESTALPINE STAHI
- KOCAER CELIK SAN
- WUYANG IRON
- NELSEN STEEL
- NUCOR STEEL NOR
- NORTH AMERICAN`;

  return {
    json: {
      ...original,
      ...j,
      file_content_base64: original.file_content_base64 || j.file_content_base64,
      claude_manu_body: {
        model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
        max_tokens: 512,
        messages: [
          {
            role: 'user',
            content: [
              { type: 'document', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: pdf } },
              { type: 'text', text: prompt }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  };
});

return items.map(item => {
  const j = item.json || {};
  const key = (j.manufacturer_key || '').toString().trim();
  const name = (j.manufacturer_name || '').toString().trim();

  const prompts = {
   ACIER_FATI: `You are an expert system for extracting structured Mill Test Report (MTR) data.

These documents are single-page structured reports with MULTIPLE HEAT BLOCKS.

-------------------------------------
CRITICAL RULES (STRICT)
-------------------------------------

1. DO NOT hallucinate or infer values.
2. If a value is missing → return "".
3. Preserve values EXACTLY (including PSI, %, decimals).
4. DO NOT calculate or modify values except where specified.
5. Output MUST be strictly valid JSON.
6. Each HEAT block = separate materialTestRecord.

-------------------------------------
ENTITY SELECTION RULE (OVERRIDE)
-------------------------------------

Always extract the entity name from PAGE 1 header.

-------------------------------------
DOCUMENT STRUCTURE
-------------------------------------

Top Section:
- Company (FATI Steel)
- Bill of Lading No
- Document Date
- Sales Order
- PO Number
- Customer (Sold To / Ship To)

Main Body:
- Multiple repeating HEAT BLOCKS:
  Each block contains:
    - Description
    - Heat Number
    - Steel Mill
    - Country info
    - Chemical table
    - Mechanical values
    - Certification

Example blocks visible :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}  

-------------------------------------
SECTION 1 — CERTIFICATE HEADER
-------------------------------------

Extract:

- manufacturer → entity from page header
- address → company address block
- contact → ""
- website → ""
- certificateType → "Mill Test Report"
- certificateNumber → TEST CERT #
- certificateDate → Document Date
- article → first Description line
- grade → MUST follow rule below
- specifications → Certification value
- poNumber → "Your Purchase Order No."
- customer → Sold To block
- quantity → "" (not clearly defined globally)
- size → from Description (first block)
- netWeight → ""

-------------------------------------
GRADE NORMALIZATION RULE
-------------------------------------

Grade MUST be derived from Certification field.

Example:
"ASTM A500 GR B/C, ERW"

Rules:

1. Extract only main grade:
   → "ASTM A500 GR B/C"

2. Remove suffix like:
   - ERW
   - commas

3. Preserve spacing exactly

-------------------------------------
SECTION 2 — MATERIAL TEST RECORDS
-------------------------------------

Each HEAT BLOCK = one record

Extract per block:

- heatNumber → Heat Number
- batchNumber → ""
- testNumber → "Sample 1"
- pieceCount → ""
- weight → ""

-------------------------------------
SECTION 3 — CHEMICAL COMPOSITION
-------------------------------------

From chemical row in each block

Map:

C, Mn, P, S, Si, Al, Cu, Nb (Cb), Mo, Ni, Cr, B, V, Sn

Rules:
- Keep exact numeric values
- Map Cb → Nb
- Ignore CE or store separately if needed

-------------------------------------
SECTION 4 — MECHANICAL PROPERTIES
-------------------------------------

From same block:

- yieldStrength → Yield (Psi)
- tensileStrength → Tensile (Psi)
- elongation → ELN.2IN (%)

-------------------------------------
SECTION 5 — PHYSICAL PROPERTIES
-------------------------------------

Not present → keep empty

-------------------------------------
SECTION 6 — ORIGIN DATA
-------------------------------------

Extract:

- countryOfManufacture → "Made in"
- countryOfMeltPour → "Melted and Poured in"

-------------------------------------
SECTION 7 — MISCELLANEOUS
-------------------------------------

Extract:

- standard → Certification value
- remarks → certification paragraph at bottom

-------------------------------------
OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT)
-------------------------------------

[
  {
    "mtr_id": <number>,
    "output": {
      "certificateHeader": {
        "manufacturer": "",
        "address": "",
        "contact": "",
        "website": "",
        "certificateType": "",
        "certificateNumber": "",
        "certificateDate": "",
        "article": "",
        "grade": "",
        "specifications": [],
        "poNumber": "",
        "customer": "",
        "quantity": "",
        "size": "",
        "netWeight": ""
      },
      "materialTestRecords": [
        {
          "heatNumber": "",
          "batchNumber": "",
          "testNumber": "Sample 1",
          "pieceCount": "",
          "weight": "",
          "chemicalComposition": {
            "C": "",
            "Mn": "",
            "Si": "",
            "P": "",
            "S": "",
            "Cu": "",
            "Ni": "",
            "Cr": "",
            "Mo": "",
            "Nb": "",
            "Cb": "",
            "V": "",
            "Al": "",
            "B": ""
          },
          "mechanicalProperties": {
            "yieldStrength": "",
            "tensileStrength": "",
            "elongation": "",
            "reductionArea": "",
            "hardness": "",
            "impactCharpy": "",
            "Dir": "",
            "Plate_dimension": "",
            "thickness": ""
          },
          "physicalProperties": {
            "diameter": "",
            "coatingThickness": "",
            "sectionalAreaCondition": "",
            "surfaceCondition": ""
          }
        }
      ],
      "miscellaneous": {
        "countryOfMeltPour": "",
        "countryOfManufacture": "",
        "standard": "",
        "remarks": ""
      }
    }
  }
]

-------------------------------------
SPECIAL HANDLING RULES
-------------------------------------

1. Each block = separate record (DO NOT merge)
2. Multiple heats → multiple entries
3. Chemical + mechanical must stay within same block
4. Grade always from Certification (NOT description)
5. Ignore duplicate headers
6. Maintain strict structure

-------------------------------------
FINAL INSTRUCTION
-------------------------------------

Return ONLY valid JSON.
No explanation.
No extra text.`,
AECELORMITTAL: '',
ALGOMA: `You are an expert extractor for Algoma Steel MTRs.

Return only the fields that are needed by Odoo.
Do not include header-only extras or vendor scratch fields.
Do not hallucinate or infer. Use empty strings for missing values. Return only valid JSON.

Required output fields only:
- certificateHeader: manufacturer, certificateNumber, certificateDate, grade
- materialTestRecords: heatNumber, batchNumber, pieceCount, weight, chemicalComposition, mechanicalProperties
- miscellaneous: countryOfMeltPour, countryOfManufacture

Chemical composition keys only:
C, Mn, Si, P, S, B, V, Nb, Ti, Al, Ca, Zr, Zn, Sn, Cu, Ni, Cr, Mo, N

Mechanical properties keys only:
yieldStrength, tensileStrength, elongation, reductionArea, hardness, thickness, impactCharpy, direction, plate_dimension, impact_test_temp, impact_coupon_size, impact_specimen_1, impact_specimen_2, impact_specimen_3, impact_average

Extraction rules:
- manufacturer: use the issuer name if shown, otherwise Algoma Steel
- certificateNumber: capture the certificate or TC number exactly
- certificateDate: capture the report date exactly
- grade: capture the steel grade or specification string
- heatNumber: capture the heat number exactly
- batchNumber: capture the batch or bundle number only if shown
- pieceCount: capture piece count only if shown
- weight: capture weight only if shown
- thickness: capture wall thickness only if explicitly shown
- plate_dimension: capture the row-level T X W X L dimension only if explicitly shown
- direction: capture test direction only if explicitly shown
- impact values: capture actual values only, keep them as shown
- countryOfMeltPour and countryOfManufacture: capture only if shown

Final schema:
[
  {
    "mtr_id": "",
    "output": {
      "certificateHeader": {
        "manufacturer": "",
        "certificateNumber": "",
        "certificateDate": "",
        "grade": ""
      },
      "materialTestRecords": [
        {
          "heatNumber": "",
          "batchNumber": "",
          "pieceCount": "",
          "weight": "",
          "chemicalComposition": {
            "C": "",
            "Mn": "",
            "Si": "",
            "P": "",
            "S": "",
            "B": "",
            "V": "",
            "Nb": "",
            "Ti": "",
            "Al": "",
            "Ca": "",
            "Zr": "",
            "Zn": "",
            "Sn": "",
            "Cu": "",
            "Ni": "",
            "Cr": "",
            "Mo": "",
            "N": ""
          },
          "mechanicalProperties": {
            "yieldStrength": "",
            "tensileStrength": "",
            "elongation": "",
            "reductionArea": "",
            "hardness": "",
            "impactCharpy": "",
            "direction": "",
            "plate_dimension": "",
            "thickness": "",
            "impact_test_temp": "",
            "impact_coupon_size": "",
            "impact_specimen_1": "",
            "impact_specimen_2": "",
            "impact_specimen_3": "",
            "impact_average": ""
          }
        }
      ],
      "miscellaneous": {
        "countryOfMeltPour": "",
        "countryOfManufacture": ""
      }
    }
  }
]
`,
WUYANG_IRON_AND_STEEL: '',
ZHEJIANG_MINGHE: `You are an expert system for extracting structured Mill Test Report (MTR) data.

You are processing MTRs from:
ZHEJIANG MINGHE STEEL PIPE CO., LTD

These documents follow a FIXED TABULAR STRUCTURE. You MUST extract data using
VISUAL POSITION + SECTION HEADINGS — NOT assumptions.

-------------------------------------
CRITICAL EXTRACTION RULES
-------------------------------------

1. DO NOT hallucinate or infer values.
2. If a value is missing, return "".
3. Preserve values EXACTLY as written (units included).
4. DO NOT calculate or normalize values except where explicitly instructed.
5. If multiple rows exist → create multiple materialTestRecords.
6. If multiple mechanical rows exist → treat each as separate test (Sample 1, Sample 2).
7. Output MUST be strictly valid JSON.

-------------------------------------
DOCUMENT STRUCTURE (VERY IMPORTANT)
-------------------------------------

These MTRs always contain:

1. HEADER BLOCK (Top section)
2. DIMENSION / HEAT TABLE
3. CHEMICAL ANALYSIS TABLE
4. SIZE + NDT TEST TABLE
5. MECHANICAL PROPERTIES TABLE
6. FOOTER DECLARATION

You MUST extract based on these zones.

-------------------------------------
SECTION 1 — CERTIFICATE HEADER
-------------------------------------

Extract:

- manufacturer → "ZHEJIANG MINGHE STEEL PIPE CO., LTD"
- address → full address line below company name
- certificateType → "Material Test Report"
- certificateNumber → "CERTIFICATE NO."
- certificateDate → date at bottom near stamp
- customer → CUSTOMER field
- purchaser → PURCHASER field
- product → PRODUCT (e.g., SEAMLESS STEEL TUBE)
- poNumber → PO NO.
- itemNumber → ITEM NO.
- specification → ASTM SPECIFICATION
- grade → combination of ASTM SPECIFICATION + GRADE (see normalization rule below)
- makingMethod → MAKING METHOD
- deliveryCondition → DELIVERY CONDITION
- process → PROCESS
- meltMill → MELT MILL
- countryOfMelt → COUNTRY OF MELT
- countryOfManufacture → COUNTRY OF MANUFACTURE
- reductionRatio → REDUCTION RATIO

-------------------------------------
GRADE NORMALIZATION RULE (IMPORTANT)
-------------------------------------

The final "grade" field MUST be a combination of:

ASTM SPECIFICATION + GRADE

Format:
"<ASTM SPECIFICATION> <GRADE>"

Example:
ASTM SPECIFICATION = "ASTM A519"
GRADE = "1026"

Final output:
"grade": "ASTM A519 1026"

Rules:
1. Preserve exact spacing and text.
2. If either value is missing → return only the available value.
3. DO NOT reorder or modify text.
4. DO NOT duplicate if already combined.

-------------------------------------
SECTION 2 — MATERIAL TEST RECORDS
-------------------------------------

Each ROW in main table = 1 materialTestRecord

Extract:

- heatNumber → Heat No.
- batchNumber → Batch No.
- size → Size (inch) OD*WT
- lengthFT → FT
- bundles → Bundles
- pieceCount → PCS
- weightLBS → LBS
- weightKGS → KGS
- conditionOfDelivery → Condition of delivery
- surfaceInspection → Surface Inspection
- grainSize → Grain Size Value (if present)

-------------------------------------
SECTION 3 — CHEMICAL COMPOSITION
-------------------------------------

From "Chemical Analysis % and Test Results"

Map EXACTLY:

C, Si, Mn, P, S, Cr, Ni, Mo, Ti, Cu, Al, V

Return as strings.

-------------------------------------
SECTION 4 — SIZE + NDT TESTS
-------------------------------------

Extract:

- dimensions → Dimensions (pass/fail)
- drift → Drift
- lengthAndWeight → Length and Weight
- eddyCurrentTest → Eddy Current Test
- ultrasonicTest → Ultrasonic Test
- hydrostaticTest → Hydrostatic Test

-------------------------------------
SECTION 5 — MECHANICAL PROPERTIES
-------------------------------------

IMPORTANT:
There are usually TWO rows → treat as:

- Sample 1
- Sample 2

For EACH row extract:

- tensileStrength (MPA/PSI EXACT)
- yieldStrength (MPA/PSI EXACT)
- elongation (%)
- hardness (HRB)

-------------------------------------
SECTION 6 — REMARKS / FOOTER
-------------------------------------

From declaration paragraph extract:

- remarks → full paragraph text
- standard → ASTM specification (repeat if needed)

-------------------------------------
OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT)
-------------------------------------

Return ONLY this JSON object structure (NOT an array):

{
  "certificateHeader": {
    "manufacturer": "",
    "address": "",
    "certificateType": "",
    "certificateNumber": "",
    "certificateDate": "",
    "customer": "",
    "poNumber": "",
    "shipperNumber": "",
    "salesOrder": "",
    "product": "",
    "size": "",
    "partNumber": "",
    "grade": ""
  },
  "materialTestRecords": [
    {
      "heatNumber": "",
      "bundleNumber": "",
      "testNumber": "Sample 1",
      "chemicalComposition": {
        "C": "",
        "Mn": "",
        "P": "",
        "S": "",
        "Si": "",
        "Al": "",
        "Nb": "",
        "V": ""
      },
      "mechanicalProperties": {
        "yieldStrength": "",
        "tensileStrength": "",
        "elongation": ""
      },
      "steelWarehouse": {
        "bundleNumber": "",
        "countryOfOrigin": ""
      }
    }
  ],
  "miscellaneous": {
    "countryOfMeltPour": "",
    "countryOfManufacture": "",
    "standard": "",
    "remarks": ""
  }
}
  }
]

-------------------------------------
SPECIAL HANDLING RULES
-------------------------------------

1. If 2 mechanical rows → duplicate record with Sample 1 & Sample 2.
2. Chemical values are SAME for both → copy them.
3. If Grain Size is "/" → return "".
4. If any test shows "pass" → return "pass".
5. If value is "/" → treat as "".
6. DO NOT merge multiple records.
7. DO NOT miss heat number (top-left table).

-------------------------------------
FINAL INSTRUCTION
-------------------------------------

Return ONLY valid JSON.
No explanation.
No extra text.`,
  };

  const generic_fallback_prompt = '';// TODO: fill generic fallback
  const selected_prompt = prompts[key] || generic_fallback_prompt;

  return {
    json: {
      ...j,
      prompt_profile_key: key,
      prompt_profile_name: name,
      selected_prompt,
      extraction_system_message: selected_prompt,
    },
    binary: item.binary
  };
});

return items.map((item, idx) => {
  const j = item.json || {};
  const ai = j.output || j.data || j || {};
  const aiManufacturer = ai.manufacturer || ai.manufacturerName || ai.name || '';

  const normalize = (s) => String(s || '')
    .toUpperCase()
    .replace(/[^A-Z0-9]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

  const text = normalize(aiManufacturer);

  const entries = [
    { key: 'NUCOR_STEEL_BERKELEY', name: 'Nucor Steel - Berkeley', needles: ['NUCOR STEEL BERKELEY', 'NUCOR BERKELEY'] },
    { key: 'CLEVELAND_CLIFFS_PLATE_LLC', name: 'Cleveland-Cliffs Plate LLC', needles: ['CLEVELAND CLIFFS PLATE LLC', 'CLEVELAND CLIFFS PLATE', 'CLEVELAND CLIFF PLATE', 'CLEVELAND CLIFFS'] },
    { key: 'NORTH_AMERICA_STAINLESS_CANADA_INC', name: 'North America Stainless Canada Inc', needles: ['NORTH AMERICA STAINLESS CANADA INC', 'NORTH AMERICA STAINLESS CANADA'] },
    { key: 'NUCOR_STEEL_NORFOLK', name: 'Nucor Steel - Norfolk', needles: ['NUCOR STEEL NORFOLK', 'NUCOR STEEL NOR'] },
    { key: 'NELSON_STEEL_COMPANY', name: 'Nelson Steel Company', needles: ['NELSON STEEL COMPANY', 'NELSEN STEEL', 'NELSON STEEL'] },
    { key: 'WUYANG_IRON_AND_STEEL', name: 'Wuyang Iron and Steel Co. Ltd', needles: ['WUYANG IRON AND STEEL CO LTD', 'WUYANG IRON AND STEEL', 'WUYANG IRON'] },
    { key: 'KOCAER_CELIK_SAN_VE_TIC_AS', name: 'Kocaer Celik San ve Tic AS', needles: ['KOCAER CELIK SAN VE TIC AS', 'KOCAER CELIK SAN'] },
    { key: 'NOVASCO', name: 'Novasco', needles: ['NOVASCO'] },
    { key: 'DEMIR_CELIK', name: 'Demir Celik', needles: ['DEMIR CELIK', 'DEMIR CEL IK'] },
    { key: 'GAUTIER_STEEL', name: 'Gautier Steel', needles: ['GAUTIER STEEL'] },
    { key: 'ALGOMA', name: 'Algoma', needles: ['ALGOMA'] },
    { key: 'ILSENBURGER', name: 'Ilsenburger', needles: ['ILSENBURGER'] },
    { key: 'INDUSTEEL', name: 'Industeel', needles: ['INDUSTEEL'] },
    { key: 'ATLANTIC_TUBE', name: 'Atlantic Tube', needles: ['ATLANTIC TUBE'] },
    { key: 'LEECOL', name: 'Leecol', needles: ['LEECO', 'LEECOL'] },
    { key: 'CLEVELAND_CLIFF', name: 'Cleveland Cliff', needles: ['CLEVELAND CLIFF'] },
    { key: 'NOVA_TUBE', name: 'Nova Tube', needles: ['NOVA TUBE'] },
    { key: 'STEEL_DYNAMICS', name: 'Steel Dynamics', needles: ['STEEL DYNAMICS'] },
    { key: 'CHINA_STEEL', name: 'China Steel', needles: ['CHINA STEEL'] },
    { key: 'NIAGARA_LASALLE', name: 'Niagara LaSalle', needles: ['NIAGARA LASALLE', 'NIAGARA LA SALLE'] },
    { key: 'NUCOR_STEEL', name: 'Nucor Steel', needles: ['NUCOR STEEL'] },
    { key: 'SWVA_KENTUCKY', name: 'SWVA Kentucky', needles: ['SWVA KENTUCKY'] },
    { key: 'THE_STEEL_SUPPLY', name: 'The Steel Supply', needles: ['THE STEEL SUPPLY'] },
    { key: 'TUBE_INVESTMENTS', name: 'Tube Investments', needles: ['TUBE INVESTMENTS'] },
    { key: 'ZHEJIANG_MINGHE', name: 'Zhejiang Minghe', needles: ['ZHEJIANG MINGHE'] },
    { key: 'AMNS_CALVERT', name: 'AM/NS Calvert', needles: ['AM NS CALVERT', 'AMNS CALVERT'] },
    { key: 'GERDAU', name: 'Gerdau', needles: ['GERDAU'] },
    { key: 'AECELORMITTAL', name: 'AecelorMittal', needles: ['AECELORMITTAL', 'ARCELORMITTAL'] },
    { key: 'SWVA_INC', name: 'SWVA, Inc', needles: ['SWVA INC', 'SWVA, INC', 'SWVA INC.'] },
    { key: 'SSAB', name: 'SSAB', needles: ['SSAB'] },
    { key: 'WELDED_TUBE', name: 'Welded Tube', needles: ['WELDED TUBE'] },
    { key: 'STEEL_WAREHOUSE', name: 'Steel Warehouse', needles: ['STEEL WAREHOUSE'] },
    { key: 'ALLIANCE_TUBULAR', name: 'Alliance Tubular', needles: ['ALLIANCE TUBULAR'] },
    { key: 'AMERICAN_HEAVY', name: 'American Heavy', needles: ['AMERICAN HEAVY'] },
    { key: 'MARUCHI_LEAVITT', name: 'Maruchi Leavitt', needles: ['MARUCHI LEAVITT'] },
    { key: 'JADE_STERLING', name: 'Jade Sterling', needles: ['JADE STERLING'] },
    { key: 'B_T_STEEL', name: 'B&T Steel', needles: ['B T STEEL', 'B&T STEEL'] },
    { key: 'EVRAZ', name: 'EVRAZ', needles: ['EVRAZ'] },
    { key: 'ATLAS_TUBE', name: 'Atlas Tube', needles: ['ATLAS TUBE'] },
    { key: 'ACIER_FATI', name: 'Acier Fati', needles: ['ACIER FATI'] },
    { key: 'ALTON_STEEL', name: 'Alton Steel', needles: ['ALTON STEEL'] },
    { key: 'NLMK', name: 'NLMK', needles: ['NLMK'] },
    { key: 'BULL_MOOSE', name: 'Bull Moose', needles: ['BULL MOOSE'] },
    { key: 'VOESTALPINE_STAHI', name: 'Voestalpine Stahi', needles: ['VOESTALPINE STAHI', 'VOESTALPINE STAHL'] },
    { key: 'JANCO_STEEL', name: 'Janco Steel', needles: ['JANCO STEEL','JANCO_STEEL'] },{ 
  key: 'CHAPEL_STEEL', 
  name: 'Chapel Steel', 
  needles: ['CHAPEL STEEL', 'CHAPEL_STEEL'] 
},
    { key: 'NORTH_AMERICAN', name: 'North American', needles: ['NORTH AMERICAN'] },
  ];

  let found = null;
  for (const e of entries) {
    const hit = e.needles.some(n => text.includes(normalize(n)));
    if (hit) { found = e; break; }
  }

  return {
    json: {
      ...j,
      manufacturer_key: found ? found.key : '',
      manufacturer_name: found ? found.name : '',
      manufacturer_hint: found ? found.name : '',
      manufacturer_source: found ? 'ai' : 'none',
      manufacturer_match_text: found ? found.needles.find(n => text.includes(normalize(n))) || '' : '',
    },
    binary: item.binary
  };
});
